zh.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Laurence de Frowick於1200年出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Ralph Frowyk26歲，母親unknown Fultby25歲。他於1224年與Alice de Frowick在英國英格蘭米德萊可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1277年在英國米德萊可享年77歲。

zh-hans.South Mymms, Middlesex, England: 英国米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Laurence de Frowick于1200年出生在英国艾可时，他的父亲Ralph Frowyk26岁，母亲unknown Fultby25岁。他于1224年与Alice de Frowick在英国英格兰米德萊可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1277年在英国米德萊可享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laurence
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French form of Latin Laurentius ‘man from Laurentum’. Laurentum was a town in Latium, which may have got its name from Latin laurus ‘laurel’, although it is more probably of pre-Roman origin. The given name was moderately popular in the Middle Ages (when it was used for girls as well as boys), under the influence of a 3rd-century saint who was one of the seven deacons of Rome. He was martyred in 258 . The legend is that, having been required to hand over the Church's treasures to the civil authorities, he assembled the poor and sick and presented them. For this act of Christian defiance, he was roasted to death on a gridiron. In England the name is also associated with St Laurence of Canterbury ( d. 619 ). A more recent influence has been the actor Sir Laurence Olivier ( 1907–89 ). See also Lawrence .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Laurence de Frowick was born in 1200, in Essex, England, his father, Ralph Frowyk, was 26 and his mother, unknown Fultby, was 25. He married Alice de Frowick in 1224, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1277, in Middlesex, England, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Laurence de Frowick est né en 1200, à Essex, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Frowyk, avait 26 ans et sa mère, unknown Fultby, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Frowick en 1224, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1277, à Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Laurence de Frowick 1200 in Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Frowyk 26 und seine Mutter unknown Fultby 25. Er hat 1224 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom Alice de Frowick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1277 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence de Frowick è nato il nel 1200 nel Essex, England, il suo padre, Ralph Frowyk, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, unknown Fultby, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Frowick nel 1224, nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1277, nel Middlesex, England, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Laurence de Frowickが1200年にイギリスエセックスで生まれた時，父Ralph Frowykは26歳，母unknown Fultbyは25歳であった。1224年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスでAlice de Frowickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1277年にイギリスミッドレセックスで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Laurence de Frowick(이)가 1200년 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Frowyk(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 unknown Fultby(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 Alice de Frowick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1277년 영국 미들레세스에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Laurence de Frowick nasceu em 1200, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Frowyk, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, unknown Fultby, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Frowick em 1224, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1277, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Laurence de Frowick родился в 1200 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Frowyk было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали unknown Fultby, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Frowick в 1224 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1277 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Laurence de Frowick nació en 1200, en Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Frowyk, tenía 26 años y su mamá, unknown Fultby, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice de Frowick en 1224, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1277, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años.
